Add a prefix flag to AbortReq and /abort_request: the tokenizer manager's early-return check now prefix-matches tracked rids instead of dropping non-exact ones before they reach the scheduler (which already matches via rid.startswith).

Modifications

sglang.title: [lora-related] feat(sglang-miles): Support upsert when loading adapters from tensors/distributed
sglang.author: mathewjhan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add an upsert flag to the tensor/distributed LoRA load paths: an already-registered adapter has its weights refreshed in place, reusing the existing lora_id and memory-pool slot, instead of failing as a duplicate. Avoids the unload -> wait_for_unload cycle for RL-style adapter weight updates.

Motiv

Motivation
Loading LLaDA2 on NPU with the FRACTAL_NZ weight cast enabled roughly doubles MoE weight memory, and on a 64 GB 910B3 the server fails to start at all.

sglang.title: Fix dropped tool calls when a stream delta carries several
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
InklingDetector.parse_streaming_increment (tool-call parser) parses at most one complete tool call per delta and re-buffers the remainder into self._buffer, relying on the next delta to drain it. When a single delta carries two or more complete tool calls, the trailing calls are left stra

sglang.title: [CI][PD] Add NIXL disaggregation functional tests

This PR adds NIXL-specific functional tests alongside the existing Mooncake disaggregation coverage. The NIXL smoke and failure-injection coverage live in one registered file, test/registered/disaggregation/test_disaggregation_nixl.py, with se

sglang.title: [Mamba] Support speculative decoding with extra_buffer_lazy
sglang.author: YAMY1234
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
extra_buffer_lazy (#27118) reduces each running request's mamba checkpoint footprint from 2 slots to 1, but was guarded off for speculative decoding ("Follow-up: Support MTP"). This PR implements that follow-up. The freed slots matter because the mamba pool is shared: whatever the running

sglang.title: [Bugfix] Place empty Qwen encoder-DP embeddings on the communication device
sglang.author: qybnb
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix Qwen multimodal inference when encoder data parallelism is enabled and an attention-TP rank is assigned no images.
In this case, the empty Qwen rope_3d embedding can remain on CPU and then be passed to the device communication group, causing HCCL/NCCL all_gather to fail with:
RuntimeE

sglang.title: Optimize LongCat-Flash router GEMM with the HPC-Ops bf16xfp32 kernel
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Optimize the LongCat-Flash router GEMM (bf16 activations x fp32 router weight) with the gemm_bf16xfp32 kernel from HPC-Ops: the fp32 weight is decomposed once into two cached bf16 halves (w = w_high + w_low / 256) and the kernel computes both bf16 GEMMs fused, preserving fp32-weight accur

sglang.title: Fix extra_buffer_lazy guard bypass
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#30437 blocks extra_buffer_lazy for the DFLASH/DSPARK spec algorithms (their verify bypasses prepare_mamba_track_for_verify, so the lazy pending slot never receives the checkpoint scatter yet is still promoted in result processing). The guard was nested under if view.speculative_num_draft

sglang.bodyExcerpt:

PR #29778 introduced DWDP and added a top-level import of DwdpManager in model_runner.py. Importing the DWDP package loads modules that require cuda.bindings.
On environments without cuda-python, this makes SGLang fail during module import even when DWDP is disabled:
ModuleNotFoundError:

sglang.title: [EPD] Make encoder register/unregister health-check robust
sglang.author: ZhengWG
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Busy encoders can miss a short health probe and get permanently dropped; keep probing evicted URLs so they re-register when healthy.
Modifications
Track _evicted_urls and continue probing them; revive into _urls on success; explicit unregister clears the revival set.
Accuracy Tests

Speed

select_experts asserts num_token_non_padded is None on the custom_routing_function branch, so any model that routes through a custom routing function cannot pass it. Under DP attention with CUDA-graph padding this is a correctness problem, not just a missing feature: the padded rows' rout

sglang.title: Negotiate PrefillDelayer only after KV-budget admission checks
sglang.author: hanming-lu

Motivation
The PrefillDelayer negotiate ran as the first statement of PrefillAdder.add_one_req, before any KV-budget admission check. A rank therefore reported local_prefillable=True merely for having a candidate request in its waiting queue.
Under high KV utilization this defeats the delayer entire

Load and run ModelOpt NVFP4_AWQ checkpoints, which share the NVFP4 weight
layout plus a per-input-channel pre_quant_scale that AWQ folds into the
weights offline.

Accept NVFP4_AWQ in the quant_algo allowlist; set is_awq on the config.
Register a per-input-channel pre_quant_scale param for AWQ layer

sglang.title: [Perf] Stack dspark dense draft per-layer ctx KV projection into one GEMM
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Stack every draft layer's ctx-KV projection into one GEMM + a batched per-head k-norm + one shared RoPE, replacing the per-layer loop in write_target_hidden_kv.
Collapses N GEMMs + N k-norms + N RoPEs into one each on the speculative-decoding hot path.

Why it is exact

write_target_hidden_

Darwin MacBookAir.local 23.6.0 Darwin Kernel Version 23.6.0: Fri J

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Prefix-cache metrics double-counted when a KV connector defers requests
vllm.author: eicherseiji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #43736.
Whenever the scheduler re-evaluates a waiting request that still has num_computed_tokens == 0, it re-runs the lookup and calls record again, adding the request's num_tokens to queries and its num_hits to hits. The metrics skew toward the multiply-counted request's statistics.
S

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix DSA crash under breakable piecewise cudagraphs

#48822 made breakable piecewise graph replay pad batch metadata to the captured shape (num_reqs padded to min(num_tokens, max_num_reqs), with zero-length trailing requests). That breaks backends whose attention
runs eagerly as graph break points and reads the real batch from the forward context: the

vllm.author: gnovack
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR modifies the VLLM_MOE_SKIP_PADDING logic introduced by #46428, removing the separate call to torch.where and instead passing the is_padding mask into the topk kernel. The topk kernel then reads from is_padding to determine whether to set any given topk_ids entry to -1.

Purpose
enable_mla_dual_rms_norm_fusion probed AITER (check_aiter_fused_qk_rmsnorm)
while building the VllmConfig in the parent process. That probe imports

method to spawn. When VLLM_ROCM_USE_AITER=1, this breaks any flow

vllm.title: [Perf][Renderer] Offload derender CPU work to renderer thread pool
vllm.author: guan404ming
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The /derender endpoints detokenize and resolve logprobs synchronously inside async handlers, blocking the event loop for all concurrent requests. Offload that work to the renderer's shared thread pool in one hop; public async API unchanged.
Not a duplicate: only open PR touching this area is
